projectDescription: Scaffold production-ready Go projects with an interactive CLI and composable optional features.
keyFeatures: Base packages for logging, config, retry, workers, state, and lifecycle
Composable feature system (postgres, docker, httpclient, ci)
Automatic dependency resolution and conflict detection
Generated projects with go.mod and git initialization
Hot-reload support with Docker Compose watch
PostgreSQL with pgx, goose migrations, and sqlc
publicApiSurface: Feature: httpclient (TLS fingerprinting with fhttp + mimic)
Base package: pkg/env (typed config from environment)
Base package: pkg/log (structured logging with slog + tint)
Base package: pkg/retry (exponential backoff with jitter)
Base package: pkg/state (file-backed JSON state with locking)
Base package: pkg/cycle (lifecycle manager for startup/shutdown)
